steps.t: Spears can be found in the cave of Tithroz in the Floodfells. You should collect the spears from Tithroz.
Spears can be found in the cave of Tithroz in the Floodfells. You should collect the spears from Tithroz.
A clue can be found in the cave of Tithroz in the Floodfells. You should search Tithroz for sign of the missing spears.
Taurogrim can be found at Shulgmokh in the Floodfells. You should seek out the Taurogrim.
Empty barrels can be found in Limlók. You should place the spears in the empty barrels.
